missingRequirements: Require authenticated access with Authorization and X-Tenant-Id and enforce project-level authorization for document generation.
Render the document, generate footer version text where supported, and compute checksumSha256 for the rendered file.

Create AuditLog records for every successful and failed review action evaluation, including before and after review status, reason/comments, correlation id, and failure outcome when no mutation occurs.
Execute validation, state update, review event insertion, and audit log persistence in a single database transaction with rollback on any failure.
Do not invent external provider request or response contracts beyond the documented statement that the external dependency contract is not specified by provided official documentation.
Add API contract tests for exact method and path coverage of all 4 scoped endpoints.
Add header validation tests covering required and optional headers exactly as specified for each endpoint.
summary: Core implementation exists for all four areas, but contract-critical gaps remain in document generation/review route mappings, review audit/transaction guarantees, external-provider contract handling, and test alignment with the specified endpoint/header contracts.
